_comment: Guided journey hubs — curated, ordered skill journeys rendered by hub.html (?j=<id>). Each step maps to a real skill that opens in the playground runner. Add a journey here; no new HTML needed.

journeys.name: Launch a Startup
journeys.tagline: From idea to first customers — the founder's path, one step at a time.

stages.title: Validate the idea
skills: Pressure-test the idea before you build.
Are you the right person for this?
Map the landscape and your wedge.

stages.title: Shape the product
skills: The one line that says who it's for and why.
Turn the idea into a buildable spec.
Rank the backlog so you build the right thing first.

stages.title: Go to market
skills: Model, packaging, and what to charge.
Copy that converts the first visitors.

stages.title: Raise & survive
skills: The narrative + slide structure investors fund.
Prove each customer is worth more than they cost.
How long the money lasts — default alive or dead.

journeys.name: New PM in 30 Days
journeys.tagline: Land in a product role and ship credibility fast.

stages.title: Learn the landscape
skills: Map the metrics that actually matter here.
Know the market you're now responsible for.

stages.title: Make your first calls
skills: Make a defensible first call on what's next.
Set goals you can be measured against.

stages.title: Build trust
skills: Tell the story of where the product goes.

journeys.name: Close the Quarter
journeys.tagline: Wrap the quarter and tell the story to leadership and the board.

stages.title: Measure
skills: Pull the quarter's numbers into a frame.
Read the cohorts behind the headline.

stages.title: Communicate
skills: The quarter in a tight, honest briefing.
